title: Zoro’s Resolve Under Helmeppo’s Bargain
main_description: Zoro’s imprisonment is shown through his promise, pride, and refusal to break. Luffy learns enough to decide that Zoro belongs beside him, while Helmeppo’s cowardice exposes the rotten core of Morgan’s rule.
key_events: Zoro’s endurance and honor are revealed.
Helmeppo’s promise is exposed as cruel manipulation.
The coming fight against Morgan becomes unavoidable.
review_reasons: Some dialogue-heavy parts still contain many unresolved speakers.
